name: Vertex, Inc.
business: Vertex provides enterprise compliance technology for global commerce, specializing in automating indirect tax obligations. Its software, data, and services enable real-time tax calculation, compliance reporting, and e-invoicing. The company serves over 4,800 direct customers, including a majority of the Fortune 500.
sellsTo: European industrial companies (chemical, pharmaceutical, medical device, metals & mining)

exposures.sentence: Vertex is a leading provider of enterprise compliance technology for global commerce.
We provide cloud services from six geographically separate data centers located on two continents: North America and Europe.
Vertex AI powers intelligence across the Vertex platform to help customers operate more efficiently, reduce risk, and improve decision-making across the compliance lifecycle.
We are exposed to cybersecurity and data privacy risks that, if realized, could materially impact our reputation and business.
We offer a global solution which delivers a unified foundation for e-invoicing and digital compliance that continuously evolves alongside regulatory changes.

catalysts.event: CEO transition: David DeStefano retired, Christopher Young appointed CEO and President
catalysts.sentence: Effective November 10, 2025, David DeStefano, our Chief Executive Officer, President and Chairperson of the Board, retired as an executive officer. In connection with Mr. DeStefano's retirement, the Board appointed Christopher Young as Chief Executive Officer, President and a Class III director, also effective as of November 10, 2025.

catalysts.event: Strategic investment in Kintsugi (AI startup for SMB tax compliance)
catalysts.sentence: During the second quarter of 2025, we completed our strategic investment in Kintsugi, a San Francisco-based, AI startup focused on automating sales tax compliance for small and mid-size businesses (the Kintsugi Investment).

catalysts.event: Launch of Smart Categorization AI solution
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, Vertex launched Smart Categorization, an AI-powered solution designed to reduce the manual effort required to map product SKUs to the correct tax categories across jurisdictions.

catalysts.event: Board authorized stock repurchase program of up to $150 million
catalysts.sentence: On October 30, 2025, our Board authorized a stock repurchase program for up to $150.0 million of our outstanding shares of Class A common stock (the Repurchase Program).
